creator: oberman@es.net
text:
Shortly after sending the last followup  I received a note that the 
author had an additional location for retreiving the tarball, so here is 
another diff. THe only difference from the last is the second 
MASTER_SITES location.

 > diff -u mwavem.orig.shar mwavem.shar
--- mwavem.orig.shar    Mon Jul 23 07:57:48 2001
+++ mwavem.shar    Mon Jul 23 13:58:11 2001
@@ -40,7 +40,6 @@
 X            $0 start
 X            ;;
 X    stop  )
-X        killall ${MWAVE_NAME}
 X            ;;
 X    start )
 X            echo -n ' modem'
@@ -60,8 +59,10 @@
 X
 XPORTNAME=    mwavem-fbsd
 XPORTVERSION=    1.1
+XPORTREVISION=    1
 XCATEGORIES=    comms
-XMASTER_SITES=    http://www.escape.com/developer/~simonw/ \
+XMASTER_SITES=    http://www.escape.com/~simonw/ \
+X        http://home.pacbell.net/simonw2/src/ \
 X        ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
 XEXTRACT_SUFX=    .tgz
 X
